sub_modules.gd_quadratic_gradient: Combinational fixed-point derivative calculator for f'(x)=2*a*x+b with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_scaled_step: Combinational fixed-point multiplier for alpha times gradient with Q-format rescaling.
sub_modules.gd_update_x: Combinational gradient descent state update computing x-step.
sub_modules.gd_signed_multiplier: Reusable combinational signed multiplier producing a double-width product.
